name: python3-fpdf
title: python3-fpdf
summary: Simple & fast PDF generation for Python
description:
Simple & fast PDF generation for Python
a library for PDF document generation under Python, ported from PHP.
.
Compared with other PDF libraries, PyFPDF is simple, small and versatile, with
advanced capabilities, and is easy to learn, extend and maintain.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-fpdf because Simple & fast PDF generation for Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-fpdf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-fpdf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-fpdf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
